description: Run STAR Light code generation for an OAPP — generates C# / ZScript / other code from a DNA definition file.
notes: Light generation reads the OAPP's DNA and emits code under the STARNET output path (configurable in STAR_DNA.json).
On success, stdout contains the list of generated file paths under data.generatedFiles.
After light generation, use write_file or write_files to extend the generated code in the workspace.

variants.label: Light from explicit DNA file path

parameters.{path-to-dna-json}: Absolute or workspace-relative path to the OAPP DNA JSON file
